publications.title: The state of AI in 2025: Agents, innovation, and transformation
publications.summary: McKinsey QuantumBlack’s annual State of AI report surveys AI adoption, agents, innovation and organizational transformation, providing the consultancy’s evidence base for enterprise AI strategy.

notes: launch_harvest 2026-06-27: official first-party URL discovered; direct fetch returned HTTP 403, so status=needs_browser for body recapture.
